name: Configure Facility Regulatory Program Flags
description:
As an Environmental Engineer, you need to configure a new facility's profile in EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Open the application and create a NEW facility with the following details:

Facility Information:
- Facility Name: Baytown Refining Complex
- Street Address: 4500 Decker Drive
- City: Baytown
- County: Harris
- State: TX
- ZIP: 77520
- Facility Phone: (281) 555-0173
- Reporting Year: 2024

Federal Regulatory Program Flags:
- Subject to EPCRA Section 302 Emergency Planning Notification? Yes
- Subject to EPCRA Section 313 (TRI Reporting)? Yes
- Subject to CAA Section 112(r) Risk Management Plan? Yes
- Subject to CERCLA Section 103? Yes (if available at facility level)

Regulatory Identification Numbers:
- EPA Identification Number (RCRA ID): TXD980625705
- Dun & Bradstreet Number: 071845236
- RMP Facility ID: 100000055289

Local Fire Department Coordination:
- Fire Department Name: Baytown Fire Department
- Fire Department Phone: (281) 422-7711

After entering all information, go to File -> Export (or similar) and export the submission as a Tier2 Submit file (.t2s) to: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\facility_regulatory_config.t2s
